creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Fun and FREE things to do in Dubai this January:

🎇 Watch the fireworks
🗓️ January 9-15, 2023 at Bluewaters and The Beach, JBR - 8.30pm
🗓️ January 16-22, 2023 at Dubai Festival City Mall - 9pm

💗 Walk through the Sky Castle
🗓️ Until January 29, 2023
📍 D3, Between Building 9 and 10

✨ See the drone show at The Beach
🗓️ Daily until January 29, 2023
🕖 7 PM & 10 PM on good weather conditions

🛍️ Visit Al Seef DSF Market for activities and live performances 
🗓️ Until January 29, 2023

🤩 Gaze at Burj Khalifa laser lights
🗓️ Wednesday to Sunday, until March 31, 2023
🕖 7:45pm, 8:45pm and 9:45pm

transcription.text: I didn't know you could move like that, two step real smooth like that, all night get down like that, turn around make it bounce like that, didn't know you could hang like that, sippin' on champagne like that, turn up get ill like that, didn't know you would
